name: repolens-skill
description: Lightweight code knowledge graph Skill for algorithm opportunity matching.

scripts.demo: npm run demo:index && npm run demo:trace && npm run demo:context && npm run demo:algo && npm run test
scripts.check:syntax: node --check repolens-graph/scripts/index_project.mjs && node --check repolens-graph/scripts/lib/path_utils.mjs && node --check repolens-graph/scripts/lib/project_walker.mjs && node --check repolens-graph/scripts/lib/project_writer.mjs && node --check repolens-graph/scripts/trace_module.mjs && node --check repolens-graph/scripts/build_context_pack.mjs && node --check repolens-graph/scripts/perf_report.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/scripts/build_block_profiles.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/scripts/retrieve_algorithms.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/scripts/generate_algo_report.mjs && node --check scripts/validate_skills.mjs && node --check repolens-graph/tests/graph.test.mjs && node --check repolens-algo/tests/algograph.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run validate:skills
